case_title: BRUCE BENNETT VS. BILL HEALY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT BILL HEALY PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT MELODY HEALY NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CERT. MAIL FOR MELODY HEALY RETURNED SIGNED.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT HEALY, BILL HEALY, MELODY
SC-108: "ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED FROM DEFT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $366.57 FILED BY BENNETT, BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT HEALY, BILL HEALY, MELODY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENNETT, BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT HEALY, BILL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENNETT, BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT HEALY, MELODY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENNETT, BRUCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HEALY, BILL HEALY, MELODY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO BILL HEALY.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER DATED JULY 25, 2008 ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED". COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.
